use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use certipy-ad because Tool for attacking AD Certificate Services.

When you need a concrete invocation, run `certipy-ad [options] [args]` as documented upstream for certipy-ad.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair certipy-ad with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `certipy-ad --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
